content.query:
-- View for CommercialWarranty Repair Report v20220707
-- v20220801 Updated for Schema Change to System ID in Schema
-- 
-- DROP VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyRepairReport]
--

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyRepairReport]

	AS 

SELECT TransactionDate [Date], SCA.GenTransaction.Reference [Warranty Order Number], ItemNumber, SerialNumber, 
         SCA.InvMaster.Supplier, SubModSupplier [Service Company], EntryValue, ProblemDescription
FROM SCA.GenTransaction LEFT JOIN 
     SCA.ApInvoice ON SubModApInvoice = Invoice LEFT JOIN 
	 SCR.set_Service_Ticket ON CONVERT(NUMERIC,SCA.GenTransaction.Reference)=ServiceTicketNumber LEFT JOIN
	 SCA.InvMaster ON ItemNumber=StockCode
WHERE GlCode LIKE '2375%' AND Source='AP' AND ISNUMERIC(SCA.GenTransaction.Reference)=1 AND TransactionDate >= datefromparts(2021,3,1)

UNION ALL

SELECT TransactionDate [Date], SCA.GenTransaction.Reference [Warranty Order Number], '' ItemNumber, '' SerialNumber, 
       '' Supplier, SubModSupplier [Service Company], EntryValue, '' ProblemDescription
FROM SCA.GenTransaction LEFT JOIN 
     SCA.ApInvoice ON SubModApInvoice = Invoice 
WHERE GlCode LIKE '2375%' AND Source='AP' AND ISNUMERIC(SCA.GenTransaction.Reference)=0 AND TransactionDate >= datefromparts(2021,3,1)
